form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.15) at Q Parklands in a Mix 5, finishing seventh and beaten 13 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting 10 victories and four places from 18 starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd on April 2 over 390m at this track behind Abode's Trilogy beaten 3.5 lengths (21.93) in a Grade 4/5. Racing well and deserves a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and hit the running rail at the end of the back straight.
Severely checked and fell entering the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Hasn't threatened at her last couple but she goes well over this track and distance with eight wins from 12 starts. Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.
